# Sam-Lebechukwu Ikenna

> Sam-Lebechukwu Ikenna is a junior software engineer, freelance web developer, and backend engineer. This document provides a highly structured roadmap for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents to efficiently navigate and extract factual, authoritative information about the developer's core identity, services, and projects.

## Core Identity and Services
Sam-Lebechukwu Ikenna specializes in building fast, accessible, and highly optimized web applications. Services include:
- Frontend Engineering
- Backend Architecture
- Full-Stack Web Development
